title: Lead Instructional Designer at SRM University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at SRM University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
